titleStmt.title: SII 36.232: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 232. (A.R. No. 232 of 1910.) IḶAMBAYAṄGŌṬṬŪR, SRIPERUMBUDUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south base of the temple of Dēvanāyakasvāmi.

summary.p: Gift of 11 kaḻañcus of gold for lighting one perpetual lamp in the temple at Iḷambayaṅkōṭṭūr in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Periyāḻvāṉ Vēyiḍaṅkoṇḍār, a kiḻāṉ of Vallam in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple accepted the money and agreed to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koṉerimel koṇṭāṉ tiripuvana cakravattikaḷ
koccaṭapaṉmar śrī cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 jaya
ṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattu kaṉṟūr
nāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvilampayaṅkoṭṭūruṭaiya nāyaṉārkku
Immaṇṭalattu puliyūr koṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu vallaṅ kiḻā
n periyāḻvān veyiṭaṅkoṇṭār can=tirātittavarai celvatāka
vaitta tirunaṉtāviḷakku 1 Ivviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟ
kāṇiyuṭaiya sivabr(ā)maṇarom kaikkoṇṭa poṉ patiṉoru kaḻañcu
Ippoṉ patiṉoru kaḻañcum kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunaṉtāviḷakku naṉṟāka
yiṭakkaṭavom Ippaṭikku cilālekhai paṇikuṭuttom Ikkoyiṟ civa brāmaṇarom
cimāheccura rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
